c.d: Ability of the app to work seamlessly across multiple devices and operating systems
Includes support for handwriting, text formatting, multimedia embedding, collaboration, export options, and templates
User-friendliness, distraction-free design, and suitability for different note-taking styles such as freeform or structured notes
Cost of use, including free tier availability, subscription fees, or one-time purchase
Ability to convert handwritten notes to editable text and support stylus input
Support for sharing notes, real-time editing, and team collaboration
Capabilities for tagging, search, version history, and organizing notes in notebooks or sections
